@sigil v0 hybrid
G: async ∧ loadUser ∧ verify ∧ minimal ∧ same_order ∧ next(err)
C: await(loadUser) ∧ async ∧ verify ∧ minimal ∧ same_order ∧ next(err)
P: loadUser ∧ async ∧ await(verify) ∧ minimal ∧ same_order ∧ next(err)
V: async ∧ await(loadUser) ∧ verify ∧ minimal ∧ same
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: async and loadUser and verify and minimal and same validation order and next(err).
Constraints: await(loadUser) and async and verify and minimal and same validation order and next(err).
Plan: loadUser and async and await(verify) and minimal and same validation order and next(err).
Verify: async and await(loadUser) and verify and minimal and same.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
